arts.ttl: Napoli aiming to bounce back in Udine
arts.sum: Udinese are on the hunt for a second consecutive win, while Napoli want to put their home defeat to Lazio behind them Antonio Conte is unbeaten in 11 Serie A games as a manager against Udinese(W9 D2) and among the teams he has met at least 10 times in the competition, the Bianconeri are the opponent against which he has his best win rate (82%).

arts.ttl: 'He did it': Ange Postecoglou thinks he knows the real reason why Antonio Conte blasted Spurs in his 2023 rant
Ange Postecoglou fights on as Tottenham return to scene of Antonio Conte rant
arts.sum: A 3-3 draw at Southampton in March 2023 proved to be Conte’s final match in charge of Spurs after a post-match tirade against his players and board.

arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Udinese vs Napoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Knocked down from Serie A's table summit, Napoli seek a way back to winning ways against mid-table Udinese. Antonio Conte's charges head into Saturday's encounter at the Bluenergy Stadium bereft of confidence after back-to-back disappointments against Lazio.
